accessGuard.title: Access required
accessGuard.introduction: Your account does not include access to these pages.

createPartnerAdmin.title: Create an admin account
createPartnerAdmin.description: Admin accounts are able to generate therapy codes
createPartnerAdmin.successDescription: Partner Admin created! Email them to say they have an account and will need to use the 'Forgot password' flow to choose a password and be able to login for the first time.

updatePartnerAdmin.title: Update partner admin
updatePartnerAdmin.formError: Make sure you have selected a partner user

crispMigration.title: Crisp → Front migration
crispMigration.description: Migrate conversations from Crisp to Front. Always run a dry run first to validate before running the full live migration.
crispMigration.warning: WARNING: Dry run is disabled. This will permanently import data into Front and cannot be easily undone. Only proceed if you are certain.

options.dryRun: Dry run — validate without writing data (recommended)
options.startDate: Only migrate conversations after this date (optional)
options.specificEmail: Specific contact email — migrates only this contact (optional)
options.specificSessionId: Specific session ID — migrates only this conversation (optional)

crispMigration.confirmDescription: You are about to run a LIVE migration. This will permanently import conversations from Crisp into Front. This action cannot be easily undone. Are you sure you want to proceed?

result.successWithErrors: Migration completed with {count} error(s). Review the errors below.
result.dryRunSuccess: Dry run completed — no data was written to Front.
result.dryRunMode: DRY RUN — no data will be written to Front

crispMigration.alreadyRunning: A migration is already in progress (started in another session). Poll the status below or wait for it to complete before starting a new one.

updatePartner.title: Update partner active status
updatePartner.inactiveDescription: {partner} is currently inactive. Reactivating {partner} will restore the partner and all previous partner admins and users
updatePartner.activeDescription: {partner} is currently active. Deactivating {partner} will also deactivate partner admins and users, making them public users. All partner data and user data will be retained and the partner can be reactivated later.
updatePartner.inactiveSuccess: {partner} admins and partner users have also been updated and will now access Bloom as public users
updatePartner.activeSuccess: Previous {partner} admins and partner users have also been updated and will now have access to Bloom as partner users
updatePartner.formError: Make sure you have selected a partner
